name_en: Small size 👄L Classic hammock bag, free-folding zipper design, can also hold a MacBook and A4 notebook. Two small pockets on the sides, perfect for a Plus phone and important cards. If you feel it's not big enough, unzip it for massive storage! With this bag, work and travel are worry-free... Versatile styles, easy to match with any outfit, even casual wear is effortless. If you go for a ladylike style, wrap a silk scarf around the handle, and the bag becomes soft and you are perfect! A bag with a fairy-like aura, gentle and elegant is its name. Such understated elegance is a favorite for the artsy crowd. Unique style, walk your own path, those who like it should get one! Spanish calfskin, the material and feel are impeccable. Top-tier leather gets softer and more textured the more you wear it! Top-tier custom hardware, lining, imported YKK zipper, ZP craftsmanship, presented beautifully. Bring the Luo family's 'transforming little diamond' to the fashion world! Size: 29*14*26cm
